channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Tributes poured in from across the world on Sunday for Senat…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Tributes poured in from across the world on Sunday for Senator Lindsey Graham, the longtime U.S. lawmaker and foreign policy hawk who died unexpectedly at age 71.
item.content:encoded: Tributes poured in from across the world on Sunday for Senator Lindsey Graham, the longtime U.S. lawmaker and foreign policy hawk who died unexpectedly at age 71.

item.title: Aziz Ansari review – a hugely gifted comic who makes funny l…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Aziz Ansari review – a hugely gifted comic who makes funny look easy
item.content:encoded: Aziz Ansari review – a hugely gifted comic who makes funny look easy

item.title: ‘He just wants to see the best version of us’: Harry Kane ac…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: ‘He just wants to see the best version of us’: Harry Kane accepts Tuchel criticism
item.content:encoded: ‘He just wants to see the best version of us’: Harry Kane accepts Tuchel criticism

item.title: While the reason for vacant seats at Argentina’s quarterfina…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: While the reason for vacant seats at Argentina’s quarterfinal victory on Saturday was not immediately clear, it’s possible that high ticket prices kept some fans away. Seats at this year’s World Cup cost at least three times more than those at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.
item.content:encoded: While the reason for vacant seats at Argentina’s quarterfinal victory on Saturday was not immediately clear, it’s possible that high ticket prices kept some fans away. Seats at this year’s World Cup cost at least three times more than those at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

item.title: Are middle-aged women really invisible? I see them everywher…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: Are middle-aged women really invisible? I see them everywhere – and not just in the mirror | Emma Beddington
item.content:encoded: Are middle-aged women really invisible? I see them everywhere – and not just in the mirror | Emma Beddington

item.title: Smart home technology can offer surprisingly simple, life-ch…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Smart home technology can offer surprisingly simple, life-changing solutions for people with disabilities, those aging in place, or anyone with temporary mobility issues. nyti.ms/3QWkMnP
item.content:encoded: Smart home technology can offer surprisingly simple, life-changing solutions for people with disabilities, those aging in place, or anyone with temporary mobility issues. nyti.ms/3QWkMnP

item.title: From @theathletic.com: After 100 World Cup matches, there ar…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathletic.com: After 100 World Cup matches, there are four teams left standing. Who is predicted to make the final? Who are the key players in each game? Is the final being played at the right stadium? Our writers answer all of that and more.
item.content:encoded: From @theathletic.com: After 100 World Cup matches, there are four teams left standing. Who is predicted to make the final? Who are the key players in each game? Is the final being played at the right stadium? Our writers answer all of that and more.

item.description: Readers reply: Why put solar panels on green space when we could put them over car parks?
item.content:encoded: Readers reply: Why put solar panels on green space when we could put them over car parks?

item.title: A Wyoming Republican is suing fellow party members for defam…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: A Wyoming Republican is suing fellow party members for defamation over alleged anti-gay comments that were made.

item.title: Lindsey Graham, who returned from Ukraine just before his de…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Lindsey Graham, who returned from Ukraine just before his death, was a forceful advocate for interventionist foreign policy. Read the obituary of the two-decade senator.
item.content:encoded: Lindsey Graham, who returned from Ukraine just before his death, was a forceful advocate for interventionist foreign policy. Read the obituary of the two-decade senator.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi and Argentina …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi and Argentina are in the World Cup semifinals — but, once again, not without controversy. A bizarre “mistaken identity” red card against Switzerland's Breel Embolo was the main talking point.

We analyzed what happened: nyti.ms/44YcwqF
item.content:encoded:
From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: Lionel Messi and Argentina are in the World Cup semifinals — but, once again, not without controversy. A bizarre “mistaken identity” red card against Switzerland's Breel Embolo was the main talking point.

We analyzed what happened: nyti.ms/44YcwqF

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [53話]目の前の神様 - 久野田ショウ | 少年ジャンプ＋ 目の前の神様 久野田ショウ <隔週…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[53話]目の前の神様 - 久野田ショウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

目の前の神様 久野田ショウ <隔週月曜更新>大刀は最近、自分の指す手に自信が持てない。自らのデビュー戦で“神様”と出会ってから、何かが変わってしまった。同世代の“神様”に勝てる日は来るのか――自らを“凡人”と思う一人の棋士と“神様”、そして彼らと同じ時代を生きた人々の物語。 [JC4巻発売中]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[53話]目の前の神様 - 久野田ショウ | 少年ジャンプ＋

目の前の神様 久野田ショウ <隔週月曜更新>大刀は最近、自分の指す手に自信が持てない。自らのデビュー戦で“神様”と出会ってから、何かが変わってしまった。同世代の“神様”に勝てる日は来るのか――自らを“凡人”と思う一人の棋士と“神様”、そして彼らと同じ時代を生きた人々の物語。 [JC4巻発売中]

item.description:

[第12話]打ち切られ漫画家と同人女 - 澄ヒビト | 少年ジャンプ＋

打ち切られ漫画家と同人女 澄ヒビト <隔週月曜更新！最新3話無料>売れない漫画家・RO傍先生こと行来はついに連載打ち切りに…失意の中、SNSを開くと、なんと自分の作品に萌えまくってるアカウントが！行来の作品で同人誌をイベントで頒布すると知って、少しでも自分の作品を好きだと言ってくれる人に会いたいと思い、行来...

[第198話]ラーメン赤猫 - アンギャマン | 少年ジャンプ＋

ラーメン赤猫 アンギャマン <最新15巻発売記念!!6巻分無料！>※一挙公開！キャンペーン期間：7/16まで※ <毎週月曜更新！最新2話無料>アニメ好評配信中！　人間のいない、猫だけが営むラーメン屋に面接に来た珠子。猫の店長に猫好きか聞かれ、珠子は正直に犬派と答えるとあっさり採用される。しかし仕事内容はラーメン屋で...

item.title: #🔖世の中 「国旗の前に、人権守れ」 新宿で「国旗損壊罪」法案に反対する集会：東京新聞デジタル 参院で審議中の「国旗…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「国旗の前に、人権守れ」　新宿で「国旗損壊罪」法案に反対する集会：東京新聞デジタル

参院で審議中の「国旗損壊罪」法案は、国旗への敬意を刑罰で強制し社会の萎縮や自己規制を生むとして、法案に反対する集会が11日夜、東京・新宿駅南口であった。参加者200人（主催者発表）が「国旗の前に、人権守れ」「国家は個人の心を縛るな」「違憲立法、権威の暴走」などと声を上げた。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「国旗の前に、人権守れ」　新宿で「国旗損壊罪」法案に反対する集会：東京新聞デジタル

参院で審議中の「国旗損壊罪」法案は、国旗への敬意を刑罰で強制し社会の萎縮や自己規制を生むとして、法案に反対する集会が11日夜、東京・新宿駅南口であった。参加者200人（主催者発表）が「国旗の前に、人権守れ」「国家は個人の心を縛るな」「違憲立法、権威の暴走」などと声を上げた。

item.title: South Carolina law suggests Sen. Lindsey Graham's death trig…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: South Carolina law suggests Sen. Lindsey Graham's death triggers an Aug. 11 special Republican primary election, and the state's governor can appoint a replacement to serve out the rest of his term, through early January. Here's how.
item.content:encoded: South Carolina law suggests Sen. Lindsey Graham's death triggers an Aug. 11 special Republican primary election, and the state's governor can appoint a replacement to serve out the rest of his term, through early January. Here's how.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 有名エンジニアの .claude/skills 公開ラッシュから学ぶ、良い Claude Code …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
有名エンジニアの .claude/skills 公開ラッシュから学ぶ、良い Claude Code Skills の書き方｜テック太郎

有名エンジニアの .claude/skills 公開ラッシュから学ぶ、良い Claude Code Skills の書き方 いま GitHub で、有名エンジニアが自分の .claude ディレクトリを丸ごと公開する動きが続いています。 Total TypeScript の Matt Pocock が公開した mattpocock/skills は 16万スター、Google Chrome チームの Addy Osmani に...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
有名エンジニアの .claude/skills 公開ラッシュから学ぶ、良い Claude Code Skills の書き方｜テック太郎

有名エンジニアの .claude/skills 公開ラッシュから学ぶ、良い Claude Code Skills の書き方 いま GitHub で、有名エンジニアが自分の .claude ディレクトリを丸ごと公開する動きが続いています。 Total TypeScript の Matt Pocock が公開した mattpocock/skills は 16万スター、Google Chrome チームの Addy Osmani に...

item.title: The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carol…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina sets up a succession drama in the deeply conservative state that risks throwing the race into chaos less than four months before the midterm elections. Tap the link in bio for more.

📷️: Michaela Stache/AFP via Getty
item.content:encoded:
The sudden death of US Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina sets up a succession drama in the deeply conservative state that risks throwing the race into chaos less than four months before the midterm elections. Tap the link in bio for more.

📷️: Michaela Stache/AFP via Getty

item.title: 🔊 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham has died at the age of …
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: 🔊 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham has died at the age of 71. President Trump called him 'one of the greatest people and Senators that I have ever known.' Listen to the Reuters World News podcast for more reut.rs/4w2XHiC
item.content:encoded: 🔊 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham has died at the age of 71. President Trump called him 'one of the greatest people and Senators that I have ever known.' Listen to the Reuters World News podcast for more reut.rs/4w2XHiC

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 第36話 おめでとう / ふたりバス - 豊林サカネ | サンデーうぇぶり ふたりバス 豊林サカ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
第36話 おめでとう / ふたりバス - 豊林サカネ | サンデーうぇぶり

ふたりバス 豊林サカネ 町全体で人口約3000人のど田舎に暮らす春平。 同級生で唯一、私立中学に進んだ 高屋川あんちゃんと同じバスで通学しています。 小学校以来会話がなくなっていた二人ですが、 ある日久々に話すきっかけが生まれ……？ ふたり　バスで始まる、淡い青色のラブ未満コメディー。
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
第36話 おめでとう / ふたりバス - 豊林サカネ | サンデーうぇぶり

ふたりバス 豊林サカネ 町全体で人口約3000人のど田舎に暮らす春平。 同級生で唯一、私立中学に進んだ 高屋川あんちゃんと同じバスで通学しています。 小学校以来会話がなくなっていた二人ですが、 ある日久々に話すきっかけが生まれ……？ ふたり　バスで始まる、淡い青色のラブ未満コメディー。

item.title: This is how we do it: ‘In our open relationship, I prefer “d…
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: This is how we do it: ‘In our open relationship, I prefer “don’t ask, don’t tell”. But he wants the details’

item.title: Trump wrote on Truth Social that the original deal was “unac…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Trump wrote on Truth Social that the original deal was “unacceptable” to him, but that the new deal was “great, and fair.”
item.content:encoded: Trump wrote on Truth Social that the original deal was “unacceptable” to him, but that the new deal was “great, and fair.”

item.title: Can a fabric really be stink-proof? To put this theory to th…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Can a fabric really be stink-proof? To put this theory to the test, writer Alexander Acimen spent nearly 10 consecutive summer days trying to stink up two different merino wool T-shirts that claim to have superior resistance to odors. nyti.ms/4eT8ohu
item.content:encoded: Can a fabric really be stink-proof? To put this theory to the test, writer Alexander Acimen spent nearly 10 consecutive summer days trying to stink up two different merino wool T-shirts that claim to have superior resistance to odors. nyti.ms/4eT8ohu
